name: cafefams-backend
description: Café Fams AI Chatbot Backend — v1.5.0: fixes silent data-loss bug (RLS policies blocked all Supabase writes for orders/feedback/chats/assist-requests), adds boot-time DB write self-test + Telegram alerting on any future save failure. Also includes v1.4.0: multi-tenant resolver (Step 3A), payment/price integrity, rate limiting, prompt-injection guardrails (input+output), memory/SSE fixes
